name: Vanilla Rum Creme Anglaise
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon dark rum, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan, bring the half-and-half just to a boil with the vanilla bean.
2. Remove the pan from heat and scrape the seeds from the bean into the half-and-half using a knife. Reserve the pod for another use if desired.
3. In a bowl, whisk together yolks, sugar, and a pinch of salt. Gradually whisk in hot half-and-half in a stream.
4. Return the custard to the pan and cook over moderately low heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until thickened (170 degrees on a candy thermometer). Do not let boil.
5. Pour the sauce through a fine sieve into a bowl and cool, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in rum.
7. Chill the sauce, covered, until very cold, at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.
Yield: 2 1/4 cups
